chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Spl. Criminal Acquittal Appeal No.D-66 of 2004 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 24.01.2018. Syed Meeral Shah A.P.G. for the appellant. Syed Meeral Shah learned Additional Prosecutor General Sindh today has filed a statement in Criminal Acquittal Appeal No.D-48 of 2001 and on the basis of said statement, the said appeal has been dismissed as withdrawn. Learned Additional Prosecutor General Sindh submits that actually this appeal has been assigned number as Criminal A.T Acquittal Appeal No.D- 66/2004 although, according to him the memo of appeal is the photostat copy of appeal No.D-48 of 2001, therefore, this appeal may also be dismissed as withdrawn. In view of the above, this Criminal Acquittal Appeal is dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
